# Copilot skill prompts (`.github/prompts/skills`)

These files are lightweight Copilot prompt wrappers. The canonical checklist for each skill area lives in `.codex/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md`.

Do not maintain duplicate checklist text here. Update the matching `.codex/skills/` file first, then keep the prompt wrapper as a pointer to that canonical checklist.

| Prompt wrapper | Canonical checklist |
|---|---|
| `admin-ui-skill.prompt.md` | `.codex/skills/admin-ui-changes/SKILL.md` |
| `ajax-controllers-skill.prompt.md` | `.codex/skills/ajax-controller-changes/SKILL.md` |
| `db-changes-skill.prompt.md` | `.codex/skills/db-changes/SKILL.md` |
| `feature-slicing-skill.prompt.md` | `.codex/skills/feature-slicing/SKILL.md` |
| `generation-pipeline-skill.prompt.md` | `.codex/skills/generation-changes/SKILL.md` |
| `pr-triage-skill.prompt.md` | `.codex/skills/pr-triage/SKILL.md` |
